seoTitle: Evanston Gardens vs Evanston South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Evanston Gardens and Evanston South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Evanston Gardens vs Evanston South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Evanston Gardens and Evanston South.
heading: Evanston Gardens vs Evanston South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Evanston Gardens, South Australia and Evanston South, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evanston Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Evanston South (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Evanston Gardens or Evanston South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Evanston Gardens has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Evanston South scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Evanston Gardens scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Evanston South scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Evanston Gardens or Evanston South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evanston Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
